name: Beef and French-Fried Potatoes (Thit Bo Xao Khoai Tay
recipeIngredient: 3 potatoes, peeled and sliced into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the bottom of a skillet with about 1/2 inch of cooking oil and heat to medium-high.
2. Drop the potato strips into the hot oil and fry until golden brown. Remove, drain, and set aside.
3. Pour off all but 3-4 tablespoons of oil from the skillet.
4. In a small bowl, stir together the cornstarch and water. Add fish sauce and mix well.
5. Reheat the remaining oil in the skillet over medium heat. Briefly sautee onion wedges and garlic for about 1 minute.
6. Add the beef to the skillet and stir-fry for approximately two minutes.
7. Stir in tomato cubes and green onions, then add the cornstarch mixture. Cook for 3-4 minutes until the liquid is reduced slightly.
8. Return the potatoes to the skillet. Mix well to heat through. Season with pepper to taste. Serve.
